creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #0)

From the log on 28th April: 


===>  Building for virtualbox-ose-kmod-6.1.34
cd /tmp/mountpoint.nAHHww/emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod/work/VirtualBox-6.1.34/src/VBox/HostDrivers && /bin/sh -c  '. /tmp/mountpoint.nAHHww/emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod/work/VirtualBox-6.1.34/env.sh && VBOX_LIBPATH_X11=/usr/local VBOX_FREEBSD_SRC=/usr/src/sys /usr/local/bin/kmk HostDrivers-scripts vboxdrv-src VBoxNetFlt-src VBoxNetAdp-src'
cd: /tmp/mountpoint.nAHHww/emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod/work/VirtualBox-6.1.34/src/VBox/HostDrivers: No such file or directory
*** Error code 2


Today, I tried a run _without_ emulators/virtualbox-ose-kmod in /etc/src.conf
